title: Functions, Multiple Results, Closures, Recursion, and Contracts · Execution Trace: Closures Capture Lifetime
summary: A rule engine needs small composable functions, explicit failure results, isolated stateful closures, and bounded recursive traversal. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go closures capture lifetime increment in a composable rule and transformation library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build closures while tracing captured variables, independent state, loop capture, lifetime, and concurrency risk.
Define and call variadic functions, distinguish the slice parameter, and forward existing slices with explicit ownership.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
